leadText: If you were looking for the currency in Pokémon GO, see Candy (GO). For the currency in Pokémon Sleep, see Candy (Sleep). Candy (Japanese: アメ Candy) is a type of item in the Pokémon games. They can be used on a Pokémon outside of battle to permanently increase certain attributes.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] All Species-based Candy share the following description: Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A candy that is packed with energy. When given to certain Pokémon, it will increase all their stats at once.
